name: io.github.contactxyz-admin/morningform
description: Read-only access to a user's personal health graph — biomarkers, symptoms, conditions, medications, source documents. Eight tools for searching nodes, fetching provenance, comparing reference ranges, and recognising temporal patterns. Bearer-token auth via the user's web settings.

environmentVariables.name: MORNINGFORM_URL
environmentVariables.description: Server endpoint override. Defaults to the production MorningForm host. Only override for local dev — controls where your bearer token is sent.
